subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! The Beauty of the All-Glorious, from the realm of the Most High, shed His effulgence upon the earth and illumined the world of being with manifest light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل بها جمال کبریا از جهان علیین تجلی بر روی زمین نمود و بنور مبین عالم وجود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
